title: Consolidated Suggestions
description: Validates consolidated.json produced by the suggestion consolidation layer

consolidated_id.description: Stable 12-char hex hash derived from sorted underlying group IDs

display_index.description: Sequential display index for human-readable ordering (CG1, CG2, ...)

description.description: Synthesized description preserving nuance from all underlying suggestions

importance.description: Highest importance level among underlying groups

type.description: Most actionable type among underlying groups

underlying_group_ids.description: Stable group_id hashes from underlying groups

model_count.description: Number of distinct models that contributed suggestions to this consolidated group

original_suggestion_count.description: Total number of individual suggestions across all underlying groups

is_singleton.description: True if this consolidated group maps 1:1 to a single underlying group

reasoning.description: Explanation of why these groups were clustered (or why a singleton stands alone)

total_original_groups.description: Total number of input groups before consolidation

total_consolidated.description: Total number of consolidated groups (merged + singletons)

merged_count.description: Number of consolidated groups that merge 2+ underlying groups

singleton_count.description: Number of consolidated groups that are 1:1 singletons

consolidation_ratio.description: Ratio of original groups to consolidated groups (original / consolidated)

plan_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the plan file contents at consolidation time

grouped_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of grouped.json contents at consolidation time

plan_hash_algorithm.description: Hash algorithm used for plan_hash and grouped_hash

skipped_report.description: True if consolidation found minimal overlap (<10% reduction) and reports were not generated

sections_processed.description: Number of plan sections that were processed for consolidation

fallback.description: Fallback strategy applied to failed batches
